title: Fruity Polish Bread Toast
description: A sweet and tangy, dairy‑free breakfast that pairs toasted rye with creamy berry sauce, honey drizzle and a sprinkle of crushed nuts for a romantic start.
instructions: Preheat a skillet over medium heat to toast bread slices.
Brush each slice lightly with lemon juice and sprinkle a pinch of salt to enhance sourness.
Place the bread slices in the skillet and toast until golden brown on both sides, about 2 minutes per side.
While the bread is toasting, combine blueberries, strawberries, honey, and cinnamon in a bowl.
Mash the fruit mixture with a fork until it becomes a chunky sauce.
Spread a generous layer of cashew cream over each toasted slice.
Spoon the berry sauce over the cream, allowing it to pool slightly at the edges.
Drizzle additional honey over the top and sprinkle crushed almonds for crunch.
Serve immediately, garnishing with an extra drizzle of honey if desired.
Enjoy the sweet, sour, and creamy flavors of this dairy‑free Polish toast.
